content.Text:
[Tue 2026-04-21 14:49 PDT] Add a new feature module called "SmartSessionPrioritizer" to app.js in agenticchat. This is a browser-based chat app where all features are IIFE modules appended to the end of app.js, with CSS in style.css and HTML overlay markup injected via JS on DOMContentLoaded.

## Feature: Smart Session Prioritizer (Alt+Shift+P)

An autonomous session importance scoring system that analyzes all saved sessions and ranks them by priority. It detects unresolved questions, action items, urgency signals, and staleness to help users know which conversations need attention.

### How it works:
1. Scans all sessions from localStorage (key pattern: sessions stored by SessionManager - look at how other modules like SmartModelAdvisor or SessionLinker access sessions)
2. For each session, analyze messages to compute priority scores based on:
   - **Unresolved questions**: User questions without adequate follow-up (high weight)
   - **Action items**: Messages containing TODO, action item, next step, deadline language (high weight)
   - **Recency decay**: More recent sessions score higher
   - **Conversation length**: Longer conversations with recent activity score higher
   - **Urgency signals**: Words like "urgent", "ASAP", "deadline", "important", "critical" (boost)
   - **Staleness penalty**: Sessions with no activity for days get flagged as "stale"
3. Shows a dashboard overlay with:
   - Priority queue: sessions sorted by priority score (highest first)
   - Each entry shows: session name, priority score badge (🔴 critical, 🟡 medium, 🟢 low), reason tags (e.g., "2 unresolved questions", "has action items", "stale")
   - Click to switch to that session
   - Auto-scan toggle: periodically re-scores in background
   - Filter by priority level

### Technical requirements:
- Follow the same IIFE revealing module pattern as all other modules in app.js
- Append to the END of app.js (after the last module)
- Register with KeyboardShortcuts (Alt+Shift+P), CommandPalette ('prioritizer'), and SlashCommands ('/prioritizer')
- Store state in localStorage under 'agenticchat_session_priorities'
- Create the overlay/panel HTML dynamically in JS (document.createElement), don't modify index.html
- Add CSS to style.css following existing patterns (dark theme variables, transitions)
- The module should be named SmartSessionPrioritizer
- Access sessions via: JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('agenticchat_sessions') || '[]') — look at how SessionLinker or GlobalSessionSearch modules access session data for the correct key/pattern
- For session switching, call SessionManager.load(sessionId) if available

### CSS to add to style.css:
Add at the end of style.css. Use existing CSS variable patterns (--bg-primary, --text-primary, etc.) from the file. Include styles for:
- #prioritizer-overlay (full screen backdrop)
- #prioritizer-panel (centered modal)
- .prioritizer-item (session row)
- .priority-badge (colored score badge)
- .priority-tag (reason tags)
- Responsive and dark-theme compatible

### Update the module comment header at the top of app.js:
Add SmartSessionPrioritizer to the feature list in the comment block at lines ~1-110.

### Build verification:
Run `node -c app.js` to verify syntax after changes.

DO NOT modify index.html. Only modify app.js and style.css.
I’m inspecting `app.js` and `style.css` to match the existing module pattern, session access helpers, and registration hooks before I patch anything.
The target path I tried doesn’t exist under the current workspace. I’m locating the actual `agenticchat` files, then I’ll patch against the right directory.

content.Text: I found the repo root. Next I’m reading the existing feature header, session-access code, and registration points so the new module matches the app’s conventions instead of guessing.
I have the overall structure. Now I’m pulling the exact session schema and command registration APIs from nearby modules so the prioritizer uses the same storage and hooks.

 * Agentic Chat - Application Logic
 *
 * Architecture (50 modules, all revealing-module-pattern IIFEs):
 *
 *   Core:
 *   SafeStorage          - safe localStorage wrapper for restricted-storage environments
 *   TextAnalytics        - shared NLP utilities (stopwords, tokenise, TF-IDF, cosine sim)
 *   ChatConfig           - constants, model list, pricing, and runtime configuration
 *   ConversationManager  - history management (add, trim, clear, token estimation)
 *   SandboxRunner        - iframe sandbox for executing LLM-generated code
 *   ApiKeyManager        - OpenAI key + per-service key storage, modal handling
 *   UIController         - DOM updates, button state, character count
 *   ChatController       - orchestrates sending messages, processing responses
 *
 *   Features:
 *   PromptTemplates      - categorized prompt library with search and one-click insert
 *   HistoryPanel         - slide-out conversation history with export/import
 *   SnippetLibrary       - persistent code snippet storage with tagging and search
 *   MessageSearch        - full-text search across conversation messages
 *   ChatBookmarks        - bookmark individual messages for quick reference
 *   SlashCommands        - slash-command dropdown (autocomplete, keyboard nav)
 *   MessageReactions     - per-message emoji reactions with persistent counts
 *   KeyboardShortcuts    - global keyboard shortcuts with help modal
 *   VoiceInput           - browser speech recognition with language selection
 *   ThemeManager         - dark/light theme with OS preference detection
 *   SessionManager       - multi-session persistence with auto-save, pinning, and quota mgmt
 *   SessionNotes         - per-session notes/memos with inline editing
 *   CrossTabSync         - multi-tab conflict detection via storage events + BroadcastChannel
 *   ChatStats            - conversation analytics (word counts, code blocks, timing)
 *   CostDashboard        - persistent API spend tracker with budget alerts
 *   PersonaPresets       - switchable system prompt presets with custom persona support
 *   ModelSelector        - model picker with localStorage persistence
 *   FileDropZone         - drag-and-drop file inclusion (text-based files, 100 KB limit)
 *   FocusMode            - distraction-free zen mode (Ctrl+Shift+F)
 *   InputHistory         - navigate previous prompts with ↑/↓ arrow keys
 *   Scratchpad           - persistent notepad panel with copy/insert/download actions
 *   ResponseTimeBadge    - response time indicator below token usage area
 *   ConversationFork     - branch conversations from any message into new sessions
 *   QuickReplies         - contextual follow-up suggestion chips after AI responses
 *   MessagePinning       - pin important messages to a floating quick-jump bar
 *   ReadAloud            - text-to-speech for messages with voice/speed controls
 *   MessageDiff          - compare any two messages with visual line-level diff
 *   ConversationTimeline - visual minimap sidebar for conversation navigation
 *   ConversationSummarizer - heuristic conversation summary with topics, decisions, action items
 *   MessageAnnotations   - private notes/annotations on messages with labels
 *   ConversationChapters - named section dividers with TOC navigation
 *   ConversationTags     - colored tag labels on sessions with filtering and management
 *   FormattingToolbar    - mar...
